headline: LYB to discuss second-quarter results Friday, July 31, 2026
summary: HOUSTON and LONDON, July 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB), a leader in the global chemical industry, will announce its second-quarter 2026 financial results before the U.S. market opens Friday, July 31, followed by a webcast and teleconference to discuss the results at 11 a.m. EDT.Teleconference and webcast detailsFriday, July 31, 202611 a.m. EDTHosted by David Dennison, head of investor relationsAccess the webcast 10 to 15 minutes prior to the start of the call at www.lyb
